sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95150" key="skorodo/fqalmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκοροδ-όφθαλμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n95150.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with eye elongated antero-posteriorly</tr_> (a cause of short sight), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.47</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
